test-case.name: ImportedCourtyardUsesMeshCollidersForEveryMeshFilter

failure.message: SetUp : Unhandled log message: '[Error] Problem detected while opening the Scene file: 'Assets/FusionRPG/Scenes/SakuraAcademyPrototype.unity'. Check the following logs for more details.'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: Problem detected while opening the Scene file: 'Assets/FusionRPG/Scenes/SakuraAcademyPrototype.unity'. Check the following logs for more details. Prefab instance problem. Missing Prefab Asset: 'Traditional Temple Courtyard GLB (Missing Prefab with guid: 8cf1cec1b049ac742b38106960fe60fe)' Prefab instance problem. Missing Prefab Asset: 'Pink Fantasy Character GLB (Missing Prefab with guid: 9f01523fb0a0a25488f2504453b30d51)'
